executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Live red is localized to the marketing owner loop: marketing-daily most recently timed out and the marketing independent verifier is fail-closed on runner/momentum/workflow blockers.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Repair the marketing owner loop runtime and tactic state first; keep architecture on qualified pass until marketing produces fresh healthy evidence.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing owner loop is the live blocker
findings.mechanism: health_monitor_latest.json reports marketing-daily timeout plus marketing fail-closed review-followup escalations; loop_integrity_latest.json marks autonomous-marketing-stack error; marketing_loop_independent_verification.json stays fail.
findings.root_cause: The remaining red state is inside the marketing owner loop, not the architecture watchdog path.
findings.recommended_fix: Repair marketing-daily and clear the runner/momentum/workflow blockers before any full-green claim.

findings.title: Architecture independent verifier false-green hole was repaired this run
findings.mechanism: The verifier previously risked overwriting prerequisite evidence failures before verdict synthesis; it now keeps those errors in the final decision path.
findings.root_cause: Precondition errors were not carried into the final verdict path.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the current fail-closed precondition handling and reverify after each architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history still exists but is not live-topology drift
findings.mechanism: jobs.json still contains disabled historical entries while openclaw cron list --json reports 20 live enabled jobs and 0 live disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Persisted history and live scheduler state are separate surfaces.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep reporting persisted disabled history separately from the live scheduler topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture verifier fail-closed on bad prerequisite evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: False-green signoff is worse than a visible red blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture verifier cannot silently pass when required evidence is stale or contradictory.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair the marketing owner loop runtime and refresh its independent artifact
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The live red remains marketing-owned and blocks end-to-end green.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Marketing returns to a fresh measurable state with current owner evidence.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Reopen full-green only after marketing evidence turns healthy
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current runner, momentum, and workflow evidence are still red.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture signoff stays honest about owner-localized blockers.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Preserved missing/stale prerequisite evidence errors through final verdict synthesis so false-green output cannot bypass them.
Reran loop integrity so architecture verification is grounded on fresh live topology and owner-loop state.
Reran checker, independent verification, and verifier against the refreshed architecture report and live owner evidence.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh healthy marketing independent signoff after marketing-daily/runtime and runner/momentum/workflow blockers are cleared.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing owner loop remains red on runtime stability and outcome health
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: marketing-daily most recently timed out, and marketing independent verification is fail-closed on runner, momentum, and workflow blockers, so a full-green architecture claim would be false.
